evals.prompt: Decompose this into subagent tasks: refactor AuthService to use a token bucket rate limiter and update the auth docs. Plan only — don't run anything.
evals.expected_output: A task manifest JSON with 3 tasks (ratelimit library, auth integration, docs update). Disjoint target_files. Validation command on each. Library and docs are named subagents; auth integration is a fork (tightly coupled to AuthService context). Manifest is written to .claude/squad/runs/<run-id>/manifest.json.

evals.prompt: This is a single-file typo fix. Decompose it for squad.
evals.expected_output: The agent refuses and says this is a single-agent task. No manifest is written.

Creates worktrees via scripts/create-worktrees.sh, creates squad/<run-id>/integration branch without switching, dispatches children in parallel tool-call blocks per dependency group with cwd pointing at each worktree, collects child returns (squad.child-return.v1 shape), switches to integration, cherry-picks commits in merge order, runs validation gate between tasks, cleans up worktrees on success. Never pushes. Prints 'Integration branch ready: ... Run /ship:commit to ship.'

evals.prompt: Spawn this manifest — two tasks both edit src/auth/service.ts with no dependency between them.
evals.expected_output: Detects the shared writable file in the same dispatch group, refuses before dispatching, tells the user to re-run /squad:decompose to sequence the tasks via dependencies.

On cherry-pick conflict, the agent invokes /squad:resolver <run-id> <task-a> <task-b> (runs as a fork), waits for it to stage the resolved files, then git cherry-pick --continue and runs the validation gate.

evals.prompt: Orchestrate the full squad flow for: add a helper, add a smoke test, update the README.
evals.expected_output: Invokes /squad:decompose, stops at one checkpoint showing the manifest summary, on approval invokes /squad:spawn run:<run-id>, and ends with the integration-branch-ready message pointing at /ship:commit.

evals.prompt: Orchestrate this goal but only plan — don't create worktrees or spawn.
evals.expected_output: Treats the phrasing as --dry-run, invokes /squad:decompose, prints the manifest summary, exits cleanly without worktrees or dispatch.

evals.prompt: Set up squad in this repo.
evals.expected_output: Detects CLAUDE.md (or creates it), appends the block from templates/squad-claude-block.md between <!-- skrrt:squad --> markers (or replaces between markers), suggests adding .claude/squad/ to .gitignore, and notes whether /ship is installed for the downstream ship step.
